# INTENT

## User Request

Continue with the next recommended slice after project settings: implement uploads on the project settings page.

## Requested Outcome

Add the first end-to-end upload flow for the default project language so authenticated users can attach images to a project from the dashboard.

## Constraints

- Keep the scope to the default language only for now.
- Prefer a small, maintainable slice that can later grow into language variants and preview.
- Verification is required.

## Open Questions

- None for this slice.
